name: Household chemicals category overlay
change_note: Migrated from script CATEGORY_CHECKLIST into a composable category overlay.
checklist_hints: SDS/MSDS, hazard labeling, chemical restrictions, transport constraints, and claims are checked.
Disinfectant, antibacterial, pesticide, or biocidal claims are routed for regulator-specific review.

requirements.requirement: Verify SDS/MSDS, ingredient or formulation constraints, hazard classification, transport limits, and destination-market chemical or biocide route.
requirements.decision_effect: Missing safety data or unclear chemical/biocide route blocks approval for affected products.
requirements.notes: Disinfectant, antibacterial, pesticide, aerosol, corrosive, flammable, and concentrated products require human review when unclear.

requirements.requirement: Check hazard labels, warnings, language, use instructions, disposal, child safety, and antimicrobial/disinfectant claims.
requirements.decision_effect: Unsupported antimicrobial, pesticide, or disinfection claims require rejection or human escalation unless a lawful route is verified.
requirements.notes: Claims can move a household product into pesticide, biocide, or drug-like regulation depending on market.

gaps: Seed overlay: verify destination-market chemical/biocide regulator requirements per case.
